channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Got an Apple computer for Christmas? Here are 6 apps and games to try with that new Mac
item.description: So you woke up on Christmas morning to a new Mac. Perhaps it’s the miraculous M4 Mac mini, or maybe it’s the stunning M4 Pro MacBook Pro complete with the nano texture display.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Level Up Your Privacy Game with Android 15's Private Space
item.description: Get ready to take control of your digital privacy with Android 15's latest feature, Private Space. Learn how to set up and use this game-changing addition to keep your sensitive apps and data secure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 series just leaked again – here are the top 4 rumored details
item.description: We're hearing even more about the four new models expected to make up the Galaxy S25 series next year.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: La falta de métricas de éxito de los CIO condena a muchos proyectos de IA
item.description: Según la firma de investigación IDC, muchas organizaciones han lanzado docenas de proyectos de prueba de concepto de inteligencia artificial (IA) solo para ver que un gran porcentaje fracasa, en parte porque los CIO no saben si las POC cumplen con las métricas clave.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI is helping students with disabilities. Schools worry about the risks
item.description: For Makenzie Gilkison, spelling is such a struggle that a word like rhinoceros might come out as “rineanswsaurs” or sarcastic as “srkastik.” The 14-year-old from suburban Indianapolis can sound out words, but her dyslexia makes the process so draining that she often struggles with comprehension.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Samsung pulls curtains on classified operation called Project Infinity, where teams compete relentlessly to improve security on billions of Galaxy phones
item.description: Samsung's Project Infinity, featuring Red, Blue, Purple teams, and the CTI taskforce, protects Galaxy users from cyber threats.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Le tecnologie di frontiera del 2025: le previsioni degli analisti e la visione dei CIO
item.description: Se l’AI è la tecnologia del decennio, all’orizzonte si profila una rivoluzione tecnologica altrettanto dirompente: il calcolo quantistico.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill
item.description: The latest authorization bill pushes the intelligence community to boost many of its workforce and tech efforts, including its public-private talent exchange. The post Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Snowy owl rescued from car grille by Minnesota woman who saved another bird hours earlier
item.description: A great gray owl and a snowy owl are being treated by experts after being rescued by a northern Minnesota woman.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Fingerhut, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 6 ways to turn your IT help desk into a strategic asset
item.description: The IT help desk is often considered the “dungeon” department in most IT organizations: a place where those who can’t excel at anything more meaningful in IT are left to linger, or those who are just starting out in IT must prove their mettle before launching their “true” IT careers.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok is full of bogus, potentially dangerous medical advice
item.description: TikTok is the new doctor’s office, quickly becoming a go-to platform for medical advice. Unfortunately, much of that advice is sketchy at best. A new report by the healthcare software firm Tebra found 45% of medical advice on TikTok to be false or misleading.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Trump administration’s AI team comes into focus, as agencies reach 1,700 AI use cases
item.description: Federal CIO Clare Martorana says the Trump administration should consider a shared-services model to accelerate the use of AI across agencies. The post Trump administration’s AI team comes into focus, as agencies reach 1,700 AI use cases first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: DHS OCIO uses a measured approach for IT resilience strategy
item.description: DHS’ OCIO provides two major services. It acts as the CIO for the management zone, providing endpoints, services and delivery to the CXOs. The post DHS OCIO uses a measured approach for IT resilience strategy first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: 5 network automation startups to watch
item.description: To meet digital transformation initiatives, businesses across the economy are seeking ways to automate network operations. According to a report from Mordor Intelligence, the network automation market should top $25 billion by the end of 2024, expanding to more than $71 billion in 2030.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Top 5 mistakes that could expose your financial data to cybercriminals
item.description: There are common habits and oversights that could leave your financial information vulnerable to cybercriminals, according to Kurt the CyberGuy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
